case_title: TERUAKI KATO VS. JERMAINE L THOMPSON

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KATO, TERUAKI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THOMPSON, JERMAINE L STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,740.00 FILED BY KATO, TERUAKI AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, JERMAINE L ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KATO, TERUAKI AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, JERMAINE L
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ENVELOPE MARKED: UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, JERMAINE L
